content: *마법봉, 고급* --- 이 마법봉은 3개의 충전을 가지고 있으며, 매일 새벽 1d3개의 소모한 충전을 회복합니다. 이를 들고 있는 동안, [마법](/1def7f5a1e8081d69aa0f579a00ee48b?pvs=25) 행동을 사용하여 1개의 충전을 소모하면 반경 60ft 이내에 비밀 문이나 함정이 있을 경우 마법봉이 진동하며 가장 가까운 것을 가리킵니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/0b79730a-541d-40ac-9c03-a542b1c315ab/638657414212334846.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4666A2SFUVZ%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T094253Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJIMEYCIQCFbsJtPMpv0eYfCAyw6%2FYJs7r1l1zviGoPf2jQUCS8DgIhAPeY%2B0UOZBEnKxfgnPJy2cSN%2BEcNMiOkfK6Dxqk4DiJ3Kv8DCHAQABoMNjM3NDIzMTgzODA1Igyx%2FA0R8vzBAU%2FlADoq3AP53ilyTXsNU1UEygQiGA1bea6IaRJeeyi4BirGkDAnjMgVFQSG%2B%2FgXAC4J%2BdHLhJ3VLqtvucKqeJ2dYd51GKNP1FZpcyrbBwtKUj2hLKijpgxdwGZo%2Fb22hPvguJ577Dbaz3YxbhpHd86NZ7qSePEcKnbMEynG2%2FVhfS9KIdlWQetNS0mHv2L1uqBwkiE2v3zwpLYiuIe53u8bwgqcHs9e%2Frqe8RnMdeTdZRAPqiibJ%2FN9RVgQGd2ahlpCXkoPdzf7Wkkfp4k%2BtE23uNN3WseV3ip3xMDDXRd1hLk0yvc4HYx%2F8l0SD6ZgG0frsRyiW6GdQMMeB%2FSmId%2F1iSz252MSIN6o1odf6Pfv6Q3XHOW4KWX9Fh8jp2kPVkyTl4i%2BaocWOWGz6xPlUK9bPOjTBxOAozVeJyvsFJOe5hfFnyfJ1K9lCjCP90g1gVH3loaCZwOAI1d5z5mnAyMkuxWFgbTlqM6ElvpNjQHJh4WUWZW10%2FfUwR3AUulJSl5TokXQ6Wh3EHk%2BE3Zav71adsaxMN22b2vKyGAbYY9ijXZoudmTc5NcT6OC8e2Ds3YFYxUnR5VwAWbguj%2Fn1NAs0Uf5VC%2B1X2to2x7oI0zBUDnZuDYPRmmIbF2i7aouLEb7ozDs3MPRBjqkAS7wMNBU0y%2Fkg0eRkITuyVzyR9U8y%2B%2Bczz4M5g72MA%2FVGcan09HUA1gfyOGticwopLp3crfzKKQaFfji1hxPoUgUT%2F%2BgxgV5K%2FHU9tMS1a%2FCuygWnSTb5kXHeS0cF83RWdtYpC%2FNh9KVKMCPETDrlFHYZc1FEWaXTYGQjdwobnp3zcIwfZkofTU12RtJa7Oyw28Aj%2F20wju2z1gD5FyN8P5mAKfG&X-Amz-Signature=06dac64948c539810de11ede7d2fbb57f9a0a64c3308ae5d4a4b322218c81600&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
